data.title: New Liberal Arts heading: ENTREPRENEURSHIP clips at 375px — page-specific override

data.body: Orchestrator self-review: single-class addition (max-md:text-3xl) on the LiberalArts heading, scoped to one element. Diff is one line. PR ready for human visual QA.

Cycle 2: max-md:text-3xl lost the CSS specificity battle — .text-display bakes in text-4xl via @apply (font-size: 2.25rem) and that rule comes later in the stylesheet than the responsive utility. User screenshot confirms ENTREPRENEURSHIP still clips at 36px. Fix: drop .text-display on this one element and inline its styles with raw utilities — font-serif not-italic font-light text-3xl md:text-7xl tracking-[0.04em] uppercase leading-[1.1] — so there's no .text-display to override. Same approach as FRAC-174 cycle 3 (text-body -> text-base raw).

data.reason: Cycle 2: drop .text-display, use raw utilities to bypass @apply specificity

provenance.reason: Cycle 2: drop .text-display, use raw utilities to bypass @apply specificity

data.body: Cycle 2 self-review: single-element className swap from .text-display to inline raw utilities. Preserves all visual properties (serif, not-italic, weight 300, 0.04em tracking, uppercase, 1.1 leading) while dropping mobile size from text-4xl to text-3xl. Should resolve the specificity issue. Ready for human visual QA.
